title: vigna haumaniana
intro: Vigna haumaniana, also known as the Hauman's bean or the Andean kidney bean, is a type of climbing legume native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Vigna haumaniana include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and help manage blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Vigna haumaniana can be made by infusing the leaves and seeds in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the leaves to use as a supplement.
